en: Abraham took another wife, whose name was Keturah.
zh: 亞伯拉罕又娶了一個妻子，名叫基土拉。

en: She bore him Zimran, Jokshan, Medan, Midian, Ishbak, and Shuah.
zh: 基土拉給他生了心蘭、約珊、米但、米甸、伊施巴和書亞。

en: Jokshan fathered Sheba and Dedan. The sons of Dedan were Asshurim, Letushim, and Leummim.
zh: 約珊生了示巴和底但，而底但的子孫是亞書利人、利都示人和利烏米人。

en: The sons of Midian were Ephah, Epher, Hanoch, Abida, and Eldaah. All these were the children of Keturah.
zh: 米甸的兒子是以法、以弗、哈諾、亞比大和以勒大。這些人都是基土拉的子孫。

en: Abraham gave all he had to Isaac.
zh: 亞伯拉罕把自己一切所有的都給了以撒。

en: But to the sons of his concubines Abraham gave gifts, and while he was still living he sent them away from his son Isaac, eastward to the east country.
zh: 亞伯拉罕把禮物分給他庶出的眾子，在自己還活著的時候，就打發他們離開他的兒子以撒，向東面行，往東方的地去。

en: These are the days of the years of Abraham's life, 175 years.
zh: 亞伯拉罕一生的年日是一百七十五歲。

en: Abraham breathed his last and died in a good old age, an old man and full of years, and was gathered to his people.
zh: 亞伯拉罕壽高年老，享盡天年，氣絕而死，歸到他的先人那裡去了。

en: Isaac and Ishmael his sons buried him in the cave of Machpelah, in the field of Ephron the son of Zohar the Hittite, east of Mamre,
zh: 他的兒子以撒和以實瑪利把他埋葬在麥比拉洞裡。這洞是在幔利前面，赫人瑣轄的兒子以弗崙的田間，

en: the field that Abraham purchased from the Hittites. There Abraham was buried, with Sarah his wife.
zh: 就是亞伯拉罕從赫人那裡買來的那塊田。亞伯拉罕和他的妻子撒拉都埋葬在那裡。

en: After the death of Abraham, God blessed Isaac his son. And Isaac settled at Beer-lahai-roi.
zh: 亞伯拉罕死後， 神賜福給他的兒子以撒；那時，以撒住在庇耳．拉海．萊附近。

en: These are the generations of Ishmael, Abraham's son, whom Hagar the Egyptian, Sarah's servant, bore to Abraham.
zh: 以下是撒拉的婢女埃及人夏甲，給亞伯拉罕所生的兒子以實瑪利的後代。

en: These are the names of the sons of Ishmael, named in the order of their birth: Nebaioth, the firstborn of Ishmael; and Kedar, Adbeel, Mibsam,
zh: 以實瑪利的眾子，按著他們的家譜，名字如下：以實瑪利的長子是尼拜約，其次是基達、押德別、米比衫、

en: Mishma, Dumah, Massa,
zh: 米施瑪、度瑪、瑪撒、

en: Hadad, Tema, Jetur, Naphish, and Kedemah.
zh: 哈達、提瑪、伊突、拿非施和基底瑪。

en: These are the sons of Ishmael and these are their names, by their villages and by their encampments, twelve princes according to their tribes.
zh: 這些都是以實瑪利的兒子。他們的村莊和營地都按著他們的名字命名；他們作了十二族的族長。

en: (These are the years of the life of Ishmael: 137 years. He breathed his last and died, and was gathered to his people.)
zh: 以實瑪利一生的歲數，是一百三十七歲；他氣絕而死，歸到他的先人那裡去了。

en: They settled from Havilah to Shur, which is opposite Egypt in the direction of Assyria. He settled over against all his kinsmen.
zh: 他的子孫住在哈腓拉直到埃及東面的書珥，通往亞述的道上。以實瑪利卻住在自己眾兄弟的東面。

en: These are the generations of Isaac, Abraham's son: Abraham fathered Isaac,
zh: 以下是亞伯拉罕的兒子以撒的後代。亞伯拉罕生以撒。

en: and Isaac was forty years old when he took Rebekah to be his wife, the daughter of Bethuel the Aramean of Paddan-aram, the sister of Laban the Aramean.
zh: 以撒娶利百加為妻的時候，正四十歲。利百加是巴旦．亞蘭地、亞蘭人彼土利的女兒，是亞蘭人拉班的妹妹。

en: And Isaac prayed to the LORD for his wife, because she was barren. And the LORD granted his prayer, and Rebekah his wife conceived.
zh: 以撒因為自己的妻子不生育，就為她懇求耶和華。耶和華應允了他，他的妻子利百加就懷了孕。

en: The children struggled together within her, and she said, "If it is thus, why is this happening to me?" So she went to inquire of the LORD.
zh: 雙胎在她腹中彼此碰撞，她就說：“若是這樣，我為甚麼活著呢？”她就去求問耶和華。

en: And the LORD said to her, "Two nations are in your womb, and two peoples from within you shall be divided; the one shall be stronger than the other, the older shall serve the younger."
zh: 耶和華回答她： “兩國在你肚裡， 兩族從你腹中要分出來； 將來這族必強過那族， 大的要服事小的。”

en: When her days to give birth were completed, behold, there were twins in her womb.
zh: 到了生產的時候，她肚腹中果然是一對雙生子。

en: The first came out red, all his body like a hairy cloak, so they called his name Esau.
zh: 先出來的，全身赤紅有毛，像毛衣一樣，他們就給他起名叫以掃。

en: Afterward his brother came out with his hand holding Esau's heel, so his name was called Jacob. Isaac was sixty years old when she bore them.
zh: 隨後，他的弟弟也出來了，他的手抓住以掃的腳跟，因此就給他起名叫雅各。利百加生下兩個兒子的時候，以撒年正六十歲。

en: When the boys grew up, Esau was a skillful hunter, a man of the field, while Jacob was a quiet man, dwelling in tents.
zh: 兩個孩子漸漸長大；以掃善於打獵，喜歡生活在田野；雅各為人安靜，常常住在帳棚裡。

en: Isaac loved Esau because he ate of his game, but Rebekah loved Jacob.
zh: 以撒愛以掃，因為他常吃以掃的野味；利百加卻愛雅各。

en: Once when Jacob was cooking stew, Esau came in from the field, and he was exhausted.
zh: 有一次，雅各正在煮豆湯的時候，以掃從田野回來，疲乏得很。

en: And Esau said to Jacob, "Let me eat some of that red stew, for I am exhausted!" (Therefore his name was called Edom.)
zh: 以掃對雅各說：“求你把這紅豆湯給我喝吧，因為我疲乏得很。”因此，以掃的名字又叫以東。

en: Jacob said, "Sell me your birthright now."
zh: 雅各說：“你要先把你的長子名分賣給我。”

en: Esau said, "I am about to die; of what use is a birthright to me?"
zh: 以掃說：“我快要死了，這長子名分對我有甚麼益處呢？”

en: Jacob said, "Swear to me now." So he swore to him and sold his birthright to Jacob.
zh: 雅各說：“你先向我起誓吧。”以掃就向他起了誓，把自己的長子名分賣給雅各。

en: Then Jacob gave Esau bread and lentil stew, and he ate and drank and rose and went his way. Thus Esau despised his birthright.
zh: 於是，雅各把餅和紅豆湯給了以掃；以掃吃了，喝了，就起來走了。以掃就這樣輕看了他的長子名分。
